---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for FinanceFlow
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: codewithmukeem
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? A clear description of the problem.
e.g. "I wish I could track recurring bills…"

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Mockups / Examples

If you have wireframes, sketches, or links to similar apps, add them here.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the feature request here.
